Before Sunset (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $5,792,822Details
International Box Office $5,424,524
Worldwide Box Office $11,217,346
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$219,425 (3.8% of total gross)
Legs:9.97 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:51.6% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$2,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:20 opening theaters/203 max. theaters, 8.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $11,156,551

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: July 2nd, 2004 (Limited) by Warner Independent
International Releases: August 19th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
October 14th, 2004 (Wide), released as Antes do Anoitecer (Portugal)
October 22nd, 2004 (Limited) (South Korea)
August 14th, 2024 (Limited), released as Before Sunset (비포 선셋) (South Korea)
Video Release: November 9th, 2004 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R
Running Time: 80 minutes
Franchise: Before Sunrise
Cast, crew, or production detail: Legacy Sequel, Screenplay Written By the Star
Plot point: One Night, Romance
Subgenre: Romantic Drama
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Drama
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Castle Rock Entertainment
Production Countries: United States, France
Languages: English, French
